name: Mangrove
description: Analog formant oscillator. A triangle core drives an impulse-formant engine with three waveshaping controls (FORMANT, BARREL, AIR) yielding vocal, woodwind and brass-like spectra. Hard-sync input and through-zero FM are supported.

controls.name: PITCH
controls.description: Coarse exponential frequency. Sets oscillator core pitch; sums with FINE and V/8 PITCH CV.
controls.detail: Wide sweep · tracks 1V/oct over 6 octaves via V/8

controls.name: FORMANT
controls.description: Duration of the formant impulse. Sets the spectral peak independently of pitch. CCW emphasises bass; CW pushes formant into the highs.
controls.detail: Summed with FORMANT CV · wave/formant switch changes pitch-tracking behaviour

controls.name: BARREL
controls.description: Rise/fall ratio of the impulse envelope. Morphs the formant spectrum from ramp through triangle to sawtooth shapes.
controls.detail: Symmetric at noon · CCW/CW = opposite skews

controls.name: AIR
controls.description: Output VCA and soft overdrive. Closes the FORMANT output at full CCW; noon ≈ 10Vpp clean; CW drives into wavefolder-like clipping.

controls.name: AIR attenuverter
controls.description: Grey knob. Scales and inverts AIR CV before summing into the AIR VCA.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

controls.name: wave/formant switch
controls.description: Selects whether FORMANT duration tracks pitch. constant wave: formant scales with pitch (traditional oscillator). constant formant: formant frequency stays fixed while pitch changes (vocal/woodwind behaviour).

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Linear through-zero FM input. AC-coupled; accepts audio-rate signals.

inputs.name: FM INDEX
inputs.description: DC-coupled CV controlling FM depth. Normalled high when unpatched so FM is audible by default.

inputs.name: FORMANT CV
inputs.description: DC-coupled modulation of FORMANT duration. ±5V at noon ≈ half-sweep.

inputs.name: BARREL CV
inputs.description: DC-coupled modulation of impulse rise/fall ratio. ±5V at noon covers full knob range.

inputs.name: AIR CV
inputs.description: DC-coupled modulation of AIR VCA via attenuverter.

inputs.name: SYNC
inputs.description: Soft hard-sync. Rising edges reset the oscillator core phase. AC-coupled.

outputs.name: SQUARE
outputs.description: Square wave from the oscillator core. Unaffected by FORMANT / BARREL / AIR.

outputs.name: FORMANT
outputs.description: Shaped impulse output after FORMANT, BARREL and AIR stages.

behaviors.name: constant wave mode
behaviors.description: FORMANT duration scales with pitch, so the waveshape stays consistent across the keyboard. Behaves like a conventional oscillator: the same BARREL/FORMANT setting sounds harmonically similar at every note.

behaviors.name: constant formant mode
behaviors.description: FORMANT duration stays fixed regardless of pitch. Low notes get many formant cycles per period (rich, vocal), high notes approach a single impulse. Emulates the spectral behaviour of vocal tract or wind instruments whose resonant body doesn't scale with fundamental.

behaviors.name: AIR gate + overdrive
behaviors.description: AIR is both the FORMANT output VCA and a soft clipper. Fully CCW mutes FORMANT entirely — common 'no sound' gotcha. Around noon the output is clean at 10Vpp. Past noon the VCA drives into saturation, adding even harmonics and density.

behaviors.name: SQUARE bypasses shaping
behaviors.description: SQUARE taps the oscillator core before the formant engine. It responds only to PITCH, FINE, V/8 and SYNC — FORMANT / BARREL / AIR have no effect. Useful for sub duty, sync-based cross-modulation or as a clean second voice.

behaviors.name: Through-zero linear FM
behaviors.description: FM jack is AC-coupled linear through-zero. Paired with another Mangrove or sine VCO, deep FM indices stay in tune. FM INDEX jack (normalled to +5V) acts as a VCA on the modulation depth for dynamic FM timbres.

behaviors.name: Soft sync reset
behaviors.description: SYNC performs a soft phase reset rather than a hard master/slave. Pinging SYNC with a sub-audio trigger chirps the formant; audio-rate sync produces formant-locked sidebands and cross-modulated timbres. Does not retrigger the formant envelope independently.

behaviors.name: FORMANT / BARREL interaction
behaviors.description: The same FORMANT duration sounds very different under different BARREL settings: symmetric BARREL produces triangle-like spectra, asymmetric BARREL yields sawtooth formants rich in odd/even harmonics. BARREL is most audible when FORMANT is longer than one oscillator period.

behaviors.name: Self-patched FM
behaviors.description: Patching SQUARE into FM creates self-modulation at the core pitch. Combined with FM INDEX CV you get PWM-like timbre shifts. Patching FORMANT → FM instead introduces shaped-wave feedback that colours the spectrum dynamically with BARREL and FORMANT changes.

patchIdeas.name: Spoken-vowel synthesis
patchIdeas.patch: wave/formant: constant formant · FORMANT at ~1 o'clock · BARREL just off centre · AIR at noon · Sequencer v/oct → V/8 PITCH · FORMANT CV → slow LFO for vowel glide · melody retains a fixed formant peak like a vocalised tract
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant formant
* FORMANT: ~1 o'clock
* BARREL: just off centre
* AIR: noon

LFO:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (FORMANT CV) // vowel morph
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clarinet impression
patchIdeas.patch: constant formant · FORMANT low/mid · BARREL full CCW for asymmetric ramp · AIR noon · envelope → FORMANT CV subtly · odd-harmonic-rich hollow tone · fixed formant gives low notes extra body
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant formant
* FORMANT: ~11 o'clock
* BARREL: full CCW
* AIR: noon

Envelope:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- Envelope (Out) >> Mangrove (FORMANT CV)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Through-zero FM pair
patchIdeas.patch: Two Mangroves · Mangrove A SQUARE → Mangrove B FM · Mangrove B constant wave · FM INDEX driven by envelope for dynamic FM · share v/oct so both track · classic DX-style FM with formant character
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove A:
Mangrove B:
* wave/formant: constant wave

Envelope:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove A (V/8 PITCH)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove B (V/8 PITCH)
- Mangrove A (SQUARE) -> Mangrove B (FM)
- Envelope (Out) >> Mangrove B (FM INDEX)
- Mangrove B (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: AIR overdrive lead
patchIdeas.patch: constant wave · FORMANT 2 o'clock · BARREL noon · AIR past 3 o'clock drives soft clipping · VCA bypassed (AIR is the VCA) · slow LFO → AIR CV for swelling grit · lead voice with built-in saturation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant wave
* FORMANT: ~2 o'clock
* AIR: past 3 o'clock (overdrive)

LFO:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (AIR CV)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate sync bells
patchIdeas.patch: constant formant · FORMANT 3 o'clock · BARREL CCW · external VCO → SYNC at audio rate · locked formant against swept core produces bell-like partials · modulate PITCH for sweeping bell timbre
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant formant
* FORMANT: ~3 o'clock
* BARREL: CCW

VCO:
LFO:

- VCO (Out) -> Mangrove (SYNC) // audio-rate sync
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Kick drum
patchIdeas.patch: constant wave · PITCH low · snappy envelope → V/8 PITCH for pitch drop · short envelope → AIR CV (attenuverter CW) for amplitude · BARREL asymmetric for click transient · FORMANT full CW for sharp attack · instant analog kick
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant wave
* FORMANT: full CW
* BARREL: asymmetric
* AIR: starts closed

Envelope:

- Envelope (Out) >> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH) // pitch drop
- Envelope (Out) >> Mangrove (AIR CV) // amp env
- Clock (Out) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sub + formant stack
patchIdeas.patch: SQUARE → external mixer as sub · FORMANT → same mixer as upper voice · tune FORMANT with BARREL/FORMANT for harmonic upper layer · one Mangrove carries both bass and lead parts · modulate FORMANT CV only for moving top
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant wave

Mixer:
LFO:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- Mangrove (SQUARE) -> Mixer (Sub)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Mixer (Lead)
- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (FORMANT CV) // upper voice only

patchIdeas.name: Formant-tracking LFO wobble
patchIdeas.patch: constant formant · slow bipolar LFO → BARREL CV (attenuverter moderate) · FORMANT mid · subtle LFO → FM INDEX · produces rhythmic harmonic wobble without pitch change · sits under a lead voice as pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant formant

LFO:

- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (BARREL CV) // harmonic wobble
- LFO (Out) >> Mangrove (FM INDEX)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-FM screech
patchIdeas.patch: FORMANT OUT → FM · FM INDEX high · BARREL extreme · output feeds back through shaper then back to FM input · aggressive digital-sounding noise with pitched core · great for drones and industrial tones
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* FM INDEX: high via CV
* BARREL: extreme

- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Mangrove (FM) // self-FM feedback
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Pitch-tracked formant sweep
patchIdeas.patch: constant wave · sequencer v/oct → V/8 PITCH and → FORMANT CV (attenuated) · FORMANT therefore follows pitch even in wave mode · creates a fixed harmonic ratio emphasised on every note · pseudo-violin timbre
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mangrove:
* wave/formant: constant wave

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Mangrove (V/8 PITCH)
- Sequencer (Pitch) >> Mangrove (FORMANT CV) // tracks harmonic
- Mangrove (FORMANT) -> Output (In)
